nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the libpq integration test binary, declaring the tokio and libpq dependencies needed to test RisingWave's Postgres wire protocol via the C libpq client.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief documentation for the RisingWave libpq integration tests.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point for the libpq integration test binary that connects to RisingWave via the native Postgres C client, executes prepared statements and verifies describe/exec round-trips.

nodes.name: TestOptions
nodes.summary: CLI argument struct (parsed via clap) holding connection parameters (host, port, db, user, pass) for the libpq test.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main test runner that parses options, establishes a libpq connection, and exercises prepare/describe/exec_prepared against RisingWave.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the MySQL async connection pool integration test, declaring mysql_async, tokio, and test dependencies.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the MySQL test crate; provides shared test utilities or re-exports used by the integration tests.

nodes.name: mysql_async_connection_pool.rs
nodes.summary: Async integration test that validates MySQL connection pool behavior: inserting rows, streaming queries with and without timeouts, and connection recycling.

nodes.name: test_mysql_async_with_connection_pool
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test verifying mysql_async pool lifecycle: table creation, bulk inserts, streaming reads, timeout handling, and connection disconnect.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the PostgreSQL regression test runner, declaring dependencies on tokio, psql client, and madsim for simulation mode.

nodes.name: COPYRIGHT
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL copyright notice accompanying the regression test data files, indicating their origin from the PostgreSQL project.

nodes.name: agg.data
nodes.summary: Small tab-separated data fixture for aggregate function regression tests.

nodes.name: array.data
nodes.summary: Tab-separated data fixture containing 103 rows for PostgreSQL array type regression tests.

nodes.name: constrf.data
nodes.summary: Minimal data fixture for constraint regression tests.

nodes.name: constro.data
nodes.summary: Minimal data fixture for constraint override regression tests.

nodes.name: dept.data
nodes.summary: Minimal department table seed data used in PostgreSQL regression tests.

nodes.name: desc.data
nodes.summary: Large 10,000-row data fixture for sort/descriptor regression tests.

nodes.name: emp.data
nodes.summary: Small employee table seed data for PostgreSQL regression tests.

nodes.name: hash.data
nodes.summary: Large 10,000-row data fixture for hash index regression tests.

nodes.name: jsonb.data
nodes.summary: 1,012-row JSONB data fixture used in PostgreSQL JSONB type regression tests.

nodes.name: onek.data
nodes.summary: 1,000-row data fixture representing the classic PostgreSQL 'onek' test table.

nodes.name: person.data
nodes.summary: 50-row person table seed data for PostgreSQL regression tests.

nodes.name: real_city.data
nodes.summary: Tiny city seed data for geometric/real type regression tests.

nodes.name: rect.data
nodes.summary: 3,378-row rectangle/geometric data fixture for PostgreSQL box/rect regression tests.

nodes.name: streets.data
nodes.summary: 5,124-row street address data fixture for PostgreSQL geometric regression tests.

nodes.name: stud_emp.data
nodes.summary: Minimal student-employee combination seed data for inheritance regression tests.

nodes.name: student.data
nodes.summary: Minimal student seed data for PostgreSQL regression tests.

nodes.name: tenk.data
nodes.summary: Large 10,000-row 'tenk' table seed data — the primary benchmark fixture for PostgreSQL regression tests.
